def positive_blocking_io_call_executed_per_item_without_batching():
    rule_id = "blocking_io_call_executed_per_item_without_batching"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag per-item blocking I/O where batching or grouping is possible."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
